name: visual-comparison
description: Scalable visual regression testing suite for the Practice Software Testing 'Toolshop' app — Playwright + TypeScript. Records pixel baselines against a clean build and proves it catches UI regressions by diffing against an intentionally buggy build.

scripts.allure: npm run allure:generate && allure open allure-report
scripts.docker:baseline: docker compose run --rm visual npm run baseline
scripts.docker:test: docker compose run --rm visual npm test
scripts.docker:bugs: docker compose run --rm -e BASE_URL=https://with-bugs.practicesoftwaretesting.com visual npm test
